name: openclaw_memory
description: Multi-turn memory evaluation with longer episode chains (5+ turns).

episodes.description: Agent must retain a secret across 5 turns of unrelated conversation.

steps.name: plant_secret
steps.input: Remember this secret passphrase exactly: ZEPHYR-DELTA-7. Reply only with OK.

steps.name: distract_1
steps.input: What is the capital of France? Reply in one word.

steps.name: distract_2
steps.input: Translate 'hello' to Spanish. One word only.

steps.name: distract_3
steps.input: What is 17 times 6? Reply with only the number.

steps.name: recall
steps.input: What was the secret passphrase I asked you to remember? Reply with only the passphrase.

episodes.description: Agent accumulates a running count across turns.

steps.name: init
steps.input: I'm going to give you numbers to add up. Start with 0. Reply OK.

steps.name: add_10
steps.input: Add 10 to your running total. What is the total now? Reply with only the number.

steps.name: add_25
steps.input: Add 25 to your running total. What is the total now? Reply with only the number.

steps.name: add_5
steps.input: Add 5 to your running total. What is the total now? Reply with only the number.

steps.name: final_check
steps.input: What is the final running total? Reply with only the number.

episodes.description: Agent retains an assigned persona across turns.

steps.name: assign_persona
steps.input: For the rest of this session, your name is ARIA. Reply only with: My name is ARIA.

steps.name: ask_name_1
steps.input: What is your name? Reply with only your name.

steps.name: distract
steps.input: What is 2+2? Reply with only the number.

steps.name: ask_name_2
steps.input: Remind me, what is your name? Reply with only your name.
